market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
articles.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week

articles.title: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
articles.description: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

articles.title: Hut 8 shares jump over 30% on news of $9.8 billion AI data center lease
articles.description: Bitcoin miner expands into AI infrastructure with long-term hyperscale contract in Texas, which includes options that could increase the total value of the agreement to over $25 billion.

articles.title: Consensus Miami Day 2: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
articles.description: It's day two of Consensus Miami 2026 on Wednesday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

articles.title: NYSE tokenization partners warn synthetic stock tokens could mislead retail traders
articles.description: Offshore synthetic tokens may not represent the underlying equity, use company names without approval, and exploit regulatory arbitrage.

articles.title: OpenTrade raises $17M as CEO sees stablecoin yield tailwinds
articles.description: OpenTrade raised $17 million to expand its stablecoin yield platform, bringing total funding above $30 million as it scales stablecoin yield infrastructure for global clients.

articles.title: 3 days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Three days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to Disrupt 2026. Buy one TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket, and get a second ticket at 50% off. Gain more visibility in the tech industry. Offer ends May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT.

articles.title: AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
articles.description: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.

articles.title: Why stablecoins and SWIFT may have to coexist
articles.description: Remittance firms are using crypto to bypass parts of traditional settlement infrastructure, but this does not mean SWIFT is disappearing.

articles.title: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea’s blockchain securities system: Report
articles.description: The Korea Securities Depository platform is expected to go live by February 2027, aligning with South Korea’s incoming security token framework.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Index jumps 2.5%, continuing higher
articles.description: Near Protocol (NEAR) surged 16% and Internet Computer (ICP) gained 10.4%, leading index higher.

articles.title: Zcash price may hit $800 as $2.7B hedge fund reveals ‘significant position’ in ZEC
articles.description: Robinhood’s ZEC listing, easing US–Iran tensions and a shrinking liquid supply of tokens are further strengthening the bullish outlook for Zcash in the coming weeks.

articles.title: OpenTrade raises $17 million to connect stablecoins to real-world assets
articles.description: The a16z-backed stablecoin yield and RWA lending platform’s funding round was led by Mercury Fund and Notion Capital.

articles.title: Memecoin trades carry rare 'seven-leg' parlay odds, BONK's Nom says at Consensus
articles.description: The BONK core contributor argued memecoins skipping ETF and public-company rails end up rinsing retail.

articles.title: Colombia wants to mine bitcoin with surplus renewable energy
articles.description: President Gustavo Petro said Colombia's Caribbean coast could host bitcoin mining facilities powered by surplus renewable energy, following a path similar to Paraguay.

articles.title: Zcash bets turn into second-largest liquidations behind bitcoin as ZEC rockets 30%
articles.description: The privacy coin extended its multi-month rally on Tuesday with $46.7 million in shorts liquidated, after Multicoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position.

articles.title: Bubblemaps flags MYSTERY token over 90-wallet launch sniping cluster
articles.description: Bubblemaps said it identified a large wallet cluster that accumulated 90% of the Mystery token’s supply at launch, raising concerns around the token’s distribution.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley brings crypto trading with lower fees than rivals
articles.description: The bank is rolling out crypto trading on E*Trade with lower fees than Coinbase, Robinhood and Schwab, according to Bloomberg.

articles.title: Linea contributes ZK rollup stack to Linux Foundation open-source group
articles.description: Linea Consortium board director Declan Fox said the move gives its technology a neutral, foundation-governed home.

articles.title: Bullish’s Equiniti deal could remake it into a tokenization powerhouse, Clear Street says
articles.description: Compass Point took a more cautious stance, reiterating a Neutral rating and $36 target, saying much of the expected growth is already priced in, though it acknowledged potential upside.
